seed_rate.notes: Use 30-40 kg/ha for small-seeded varieties; 45-50 kg/ha for bold-seeded.

sowing.soil_conditions: Well-drained light loams and alluvial soils with pH 6.0-7.5.

irrigation.notes: First irrigation if winter rains fail. Avoid water excess.
Critical moisture requirement. Insufficient water reduces pods number.

fertilizer.notes: Inoculate seeds with Rhizobium leguminosarum and mycorrhiza before sowing.

maturity_indicators: Pods turn light golden-brown and dry up
Top pods are dry and seed rattles inside
harvest.harvest_method: Cutting plants manually close to soil with sickles
harvest.notes: Heap harvested crop on threshing floors for 4-5 days of sun drying before threshing.
